steps.title: Split the group into two parts
steps.content: The first $25$ people cost $21$ dollars each. The remaining $n-25$ people cost $14$ dollars each.

steps.title: Check with the minimum group size
steps.content: When $n=25$, the charge should be $25\cdot 21=525$. Choice A gives $14(25)+175=525$, so it preserves the cost for the first $25$ people.
